JUDGE PROVOST, LESLIE GARBER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR S/C. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 89 ELGIN PARK, SF, CA $2,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $2,500 TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $$100/MONTH FOR 25 CONSECUTIVE MONTHS STARTING 12/15/94 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFT MICHAEL THOMAS ONLY. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
